queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: no known savings account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the determinants of default probability associated with the absence of a formal savings account and its role in reducing credit risk drivers.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Investigation into the determinants of default probability associated with the absence of a checking account and its contribution to elevated credit risk drivers.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the determinants of default probability associated with maintaining minimal savings balances below 100 DM and its role in mitigating credit risk drivers.
